sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَتْ وَزَارَةُ التَّعْلِيمِ عَنْ مَشْرُوعٍ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Ministarstvo obrazovanja najavilo je novi projekat.
sentences.translationEn: The Ministry of Education announced a new project.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعُ الذَّكَاءَ الِاصْطِنَاعِيَّ فِي الْمَدَارِسِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj projekat koristi vještačku inteligenciju u školama.
sentences.translationEn: This project uses artificial intelligence in schools.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ النِّظَامُ التَّلَامِيذَ عَلَى فَهْمِ الدُّرُوسِ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sistem pomaže učenicima da lakše razumiju lekcije.
sentences.translationEn: The system helps students understand lessons easily.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يُوَفِّرُ لِلْمُعَلِّمِينَ أَدَوَاتٍ حَدِيثَةً لِلتَّقْيِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Također, nastavnicima pruža moderne alate za ocjenjivanje.
sentences.translationEn: It also provides teachers with modern assessment tools.

sentences.arabic: يَهْدِفُ الْمَشْرُوعُ إِلَى تَطْوِيرِ مَهَارَاتِ الطُّلَّابِ التِّقْنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Projekat ima za cilj razvoj tehničkih vještina učenika.
sentences.translationEn: The project aims to develop students' technical skills.
